summary: W850 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and threads the W849 selected-cochain strictification into the existing W847 direct-source stable route. The new closed-map and closed-embedding data constructors assemble W847 route data from W735 exact inputs plus the W736 universal left-right comparison-isomorphism input. The W850 direct bounded left-calculus theorems and boundedDerivedInfinityCategoryOf... declarations show the current stable package is now reachable from exactly those two inputs. The final original four-task witness is still absent because neither the universal comparison isomorphism nor a concrete W735 branch value has been constructed.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W850 reaches the existing direct-source stable package from comparison-isomorphism data and a W735 branch, but both are still inputs rather than constructed values.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing because no concrete W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch value has been constructed.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still record nonterminal evidence and lack originalFourTaskContractCompletion.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit in the completion packet shape required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct the universal left-right comparison isomorphism for arbitrary MetrizableLCA short complexes if it cannot be discharged from the existing W821/W831 surface.

Construct W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch data for MetrizableLCA, including W720 endpoint strict-topology data, W721 localized-right-adjoint data, and W722 source-triangulation data.
Use the W850 direct-source stable route to expose a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after those inputs are real.
Refresh the review packet fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
